sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, data String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '   Hello World   '), (2, '   SQL Testing   '), (3, NULL), (4, '   ');
SELECT id, trimLeft(data) AS trimmed_data FROM test_strings WHERE trimLeft(data) IS NOT NULL AND id > 0;
SELECT id, trimLeft(data) AS trimmed_data FROM test_strings WHERE trimLeft(data) IS NULL AND id < 3;
SELECT id, trimLeft(data) AS trimmed_data FROM test_strings WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE id = test_strings.id AND trimLeft(data) LIKE 'Hello%') AND id > 0;
SELECT id, trimLeft(data) AS trimmed_data FROM (SELECT id, data FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE id = 1 AND trimLeft(data) != '';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id, trimLeft(data) AS trimmed_data FROM test_strings GROUP BY id, trimmed_data HAVING LENGTH(trimmed_data) > 5) AS grouped_data;
SELECT a.id, a.data, trimLeft(a.data) AS trimmed_data FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.id < 4 AND trimLeft(a.data) != '' AND b.data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT IF(trimLeft(data) = '', 'Empty String', 'Not Empty') AS string_status FROM test_strings HAVING string_status = 'Empty String';
SELECT id, trimLeft(data) AS cleaned_data FROM test_strings WHERE trimLeft(data) AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE data IS NULL);
